articles.author: Isaac Arnsdorf, Tara Copp
articles.title: Drones over base where Rubio, Hegseth live raise security concerns - The Washington Post
articles.description: Lockdowns at U.S. bases and a global security alert underscore concerns that Iranian retaliation could extend to officials on American soil.
articles.content: U.S. officials detected unidentified dronesabove the Washington Army base where Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth live, according to three people briefed on the situat… [+79 chars]
